title: CreatorStatus
description: This mod adds a /status command which allows users to change their status between streaming, recording, do not record and none. An icon is displayed on the tab overlay and players names change color to indicate status.
body:
This mod adds a /status command which allows users to change their status between streaming, recording, do not record and none. An icon is displayed on the tab overlay and players names change color to indicate status.

This mod works on Forge.
